insights.message: Low capital efficiency — ROE 8.5% (<10%) in FY2025
Profits are cash-backed — CFO/Net Profit ratio 1.77x in FY2025

anomalies.message: Total debt surged +123.6% YoY in FY2025 — significant leverage increase
Net profit fell -31.1% YoY in FY2023 — significant earnings deterioration
